reason: Contains extremist language and celebrates violence against authorities ('sending soldiers to hell'), uses ISIS-associated religious phrasing ('Allah Akbar'), and refers to government forces with derogatory term 'Taghut' (meaning false idol/tyrant), which is common ISIS terminology
original_post: #عاااااااااجل اسود التوحيد بتونس يرسلون 2 من جنود الطاغوت الى جهنم و اصابة 3 الله أكبر الله أكبر
